description: OhmCalc is an app that performs various electrical calculations based on Ohm's law and other electrical formulas
lazy_home_samuel_explore: The amperage I in amperes (A) is equal to the voltage V in volts (V) divided by the resistance R in ohms (Ω):

front_calm_anaconda_pick: The voltage V in volts (V) is equal to the product of the current I in amperes (A) and the resistance R in ohms (Ω):

d_section: A is the cross-sectional area (gauge) in square millimeters (mm²)
